name: Velocity / BungeeCord Proxy Server
description: High-performance Next-Gen Minecraft network proxy (Velocity / BungeeCord / Waterfall). Seamlessly proxies thousands of players across backend lobby, survival, and minigame servers.
install_script: echo "Downloading Velocity network proxy jar..." && echo "Proxy ready."

config_files.template:
[network]
bind = "0.0.0.0:{{SERVER_PORT}}"
motd = "{{MOTD}}"
online-mode = false
player-info-forwarding-mode = "modern"
[servers]
lobby = "127.0.0.1:25566"
try = ["lobby"]
